bias_reason: Tech bullish but RS conviction not at high.
action: Hold 100% SPY baseline (no leveraged overlay since Tier-1 dormant). Apply RS pair tilts within the long position.

signals.rs_conviction_label: Low — only 4/11 pairs aligned, mixed signals

watch_upgrade: Tier-1 fires (count=0 + VIX>=32) -> scale to 125-200% via overlay
watch_downgrade: Tech regime flips bearish OR RS conviction drops below medium -> reduce baseline
